test.create_query: CREATE TABLE nvk_2m (key String) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE nvk_10m (key String) Engine = Memory
CREATE TABLE nvk_30m (key String) Engine = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO nvk_2m SELECT concat('item', toString(number)) AS key FROM numbers(2000000)
INSERT INTO nvk_10m SELECT concat('item', toString(number)) AS key FROM numbers(10000000)
INSERT INTO nvk_30m SELECT concat('item', toString(number)) AS key FROM numbers(30000000)
test.query: SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_2m ORDER BY key) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_2m ORDER BY key NATURAL) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_2m ORDER BY naturalSortKey(key)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_10m ORDER BY key) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_10m ORDER BY key NATURAL) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_10m ORDER BY naturalSortKey(key)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_30m ORDER BY key) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_30m ORDER BY key NATURAL) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(length(key)) FROM (SELECT * FROM nvk_30m ORDER BY naturalSortKey(key)) FORMAT Null
